title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. odontotrichum
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. odontotrichum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like family of plants. The medicinal properties of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. odontotrichum include its ability to act as a diuretic and to stimulate the digestive system, which can help to relieve symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of using this plant are numerous, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium schmidtii subsp. odontotrichum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, with the plant's leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts.
